ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-08-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-21-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST GIGI CARLISLE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-08-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-25-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. [VACATED PER COURT'S ORAL ORDER AT THE 4-09-19 OSC HEARING.]

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Gigi Carlisle, self-represented plaintiff appearing on her own behalf. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. All previously imposed sanctions are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to APR-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
